title: arachniodes michelii
intro: Arachniodes michelii, also known as the Oriental Holly Fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Arachniodes michelii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried leaves for teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as extracts for topical applications.
